chat.disclaimerBefore: Messages and relevant course-material excerpts are sent to Cerebras for AI inference. Responses may be inaccurate; verify with course materials. See

message.sourceUnavailable: Source content not available for viewing

feedback.dialogTitle: What was wrong with this response?
feedback.dialogDescription: Pick the option that fits best. Your comment is optional but helps your teacher understand the issue.

aegis.modeToggleHint: How well do you know this subject? Beginner: Aegis goes lenient on jargon and context. Expert: Aegis expects precise terms, named constraints, and what you've already tried. Click to toggle.
aegis.sendBlockedNote: Aegis has suggestions for this prompt - see the panel. Press Send again to send as-is.
aegis.emptyBody: As you draft a prompt, Aegis offers ideas for how it could be sharper. Feedback is advisory and never blocks your message.
aegis.pendingBody: Aegis is checking your draft for ideas. Suggestions appear a moment after you stop typing; you can send at any time.
aegis.looksGoodBody: Aegis didn't find anything obvious to suggest. Send when you're ready.

intercept.title: Aegis has a couple of ideas first
intercept.body: Take a look before you send. You can revise your draft, or send it as-is.

privacy.bannerText: Before sending messages, please review how Minerva handles your data.
